title: PROFILE: Orbán, the divisive conservative radical who has refashioned European politics
summary_full: Whether admired as the defender of Christian civilisation or condemned as an illiberal disruptor, Viktor Orbán is one of the most consequential European politicians of his era
summary_public: Whether admired as the defender of Christian civilisation or condemned as an illiberal disruptor, Viktor Orbán is one of the most consequential European politicians of his era
